title: senecio pauciradiatus
intro: Senecio pauciradiatus, also known as few-flowered ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and has been used in herbal preparations for these purposes. Senecio pauciradiatus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
